verses.text: At Gaza, Samson carries off the city gates. Gaza. His strength astounds.
At Gaza, Samson carries off the city gates. Gaza. His strength astounds.
At Gaza, Samson carries off the city gates. Gaza. His strength astounds.
Delilah is hired to learn his secret. Delilah. The trap is set.
Delilah is hired to learn his secret. Delilah. The trap is set.
Thrice he deceives her, and the bonds break. Deceived. He toys with danger.
Thrice he deceives her, and the bonds break. Deceived. He toys with danger.
Thrice he deceives her, and the bonds break. Deceived. He toys with danger.
Thrice he deceives her, and the bonds break. Deceived. He toys with danger.
She presses him; he lies to her again. Pressed. He plays near the snare.
She presses him; he lies to her again. Pressed. He plays near the snare.
She presses him; he lies to her again. Pressed. He plays near the snare.
She presses him; he lies to her again. Pressed. He plays near the snare.
She presses him; he lies to her again. Pressed. He plays near the snare.
At last he tells her his hair is the secret. Told. He yields the holy secret.
At last he tells her his hair is the secret. Told. He yields the holy secret.
At last he tells her his hair is the secret. Told. He yields the holy secret.
She shaves him; the LORD departs from him. Departed. His strength was God's, not his hair.
She shaves him; the LORD departs from him. Departed. His strength was God's, not his hair.
She shaves him; the LORD departs from him. Departed. His strength was God's, not his hair.
The Philistines blind and bind him to grind. Blinded. The mighty is brought low.
The Philistines blind and bind him to grind. Blinded. The mighty is brought low.
They mock him at their feast to Dagon. Mocked. They credit their idol.
They mock him at their feast to Dagon. Mocked. They credit their idol.
They mock him at their feast to Dagon. Mocked. They credit their idol.
He asks to lean on the pillars of the house. Positioned. The end draws near.
He asks to lean on the pillars of the house. Positioned. The end draws near.
'O Lord GOD, remember me'; he pulls down the house. Remembered. He slays more in death than in life.
'O Lord GOD, remember me'; he pulls down the house. Remembered. He slays more in death than in life.
'O Lord GOD, remember me'; he pulls down the house. Remembered. He slays more in death than in life.
His brethren bury him; he had judged twenty years. Buried. The strong man's story ends.
